programme.title: Cheap Eats: Music City Munchies
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Nashville for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. Ali kicks things off with a cheesy hash brown casserole covered breakfast weenie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrew explores the cuisine of Tuscany, Italy, which is rooted in the tradition of 'cucina povera' or food made with local, high quality ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.desc: Doc and the toys learn how to wash their hands.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar

programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.desc: Antonina and her husband own the successful Warsaw Zoo in 1939 Poland. When Germany invades, they lose control of the zoo and must report to a German official. Together, they join the Resistance and begin to fight back against the oppressive regime.

programme.title: Movie: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story
programme.desc: A gym owner is at risk of losing his business unless he can come up with $50,000. He and some of his less-than-average clientele enter a dodgeball competition in order to raise the funds and save the gym from his rival.

programme.title: Being Serena

programme.title: Movie: Someone Like You
programme.desc: After being dumped, a talk-show talent scout assumes the identity of a psychoanalyst and writes a scathing column about men.

programme.title: Movie: La La Land
programme.desc: An aspiring actress meets a poor jazz pianist in Los Angeles and they fall in love. As they both work towards their dreams, they become each other's supports. They begin to have success, but find that the dreams they worked for could tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: The Adjustment Bureau
programme.desc: Mysterious forces keep a politician and a ballerina from having an affair.

programme.title: Movie: Glass

programme.desc: Mason and Strickland lean on Virgil, again, for extra-legal assistance.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men: Dark Phoenix

programme.title: Welcome to Chechnya

programme.desc: Things get political and the audience gets the final vote. Kyle asks if he should stay with his girlfriend or someone new. Then, Kesha is here to confess to her sister that she slept with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: A woman on a flight, thinking the plane is about to crash, discloses all her secrets to a seeming stranger, then later finds out the man is actually the CEO of the company she is working for.

programme.title: Movie: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A divorce lawyer meets his match when he falls for the gold-digger he defeated in court.

programme.title: Movie: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson team up to take down their nemesis, Professor Moriarty.

programme.title: Movie: Punch Drunk Love
programme.desc: A beleaguered small-business owner embarks on a romantic journey with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Movie: Witless Protection
programme.desc: A small town sheriff tries to rescue a girl who he thought was being kidnapped. He learns that the kidnappers are FBI agents who are actually trying to kill the girl.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Wonderful
programme.desc: An electrician gets the chance to fulfill a childhood dream of buying a bowling alley.

programme.title: Movie: The Lonely Guy
programme.desc: A jilted writer publishes a best-seller about being a lonely guy and becomes very popular.

programme.title: Movie: Can't Buy Me Love
programme.desc: A nerd pays a popular senior cheerleader $1,000 to pose as his girlfriend for a month.

programme.title: Movie: The Woman in Red
programme.desc: A reserved man spies a woman in a garage and considers risking everything for an affair.

programme.title: Movie: In Her Shoes
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters, with opposite dispositions, find out what bonds them together after meeting the grandmother they never knew existed.

programme.title: Amanda Seales: I Be Knowin'
programme.desc: Comedian Amanda Seales of HBO's 'Insecure' stars in her first hour-long comedy special, taped at the Edison Ballroom in New York.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.
